last_successful_step: T003 steps 3.1, 3.2, and 3.3 finalized on 2026-03-14: ClinVar, gnomAD, SHGP, and GME now have frozen BRCA normalization artifacts in GCS, the Arab pre-GME/final BRCA checkpoints were rebuilt from those normalized sources, and the supervisor UI now shows raw -> normalized -> checkpoint evidence without live BigQuery queries. T003 step 4.3 canonical-key validation is next.
